name: platform-team-progression
description: A capability state-machine progression definition on the platform tenant. Capabilities move draft → review → stable → deprecated, with attribute-gates required for each forward transition. Enforced (not advisory) so a producer cannot promote a capability to `stable` without the interface + accessibility-compliance attributes set. `target_tenant_slug` is omitted intentionally — this writes to whichever platform tenant the seed orchestrator was invoked against.

transitions.description: Cannot move into review without at least a summary and a named owner.
Promotion to `stable` requires a documented interface and an accessibility-compliance statement.
Deprecation requires the capability to name its successor — consumers need a forward pointer.
Move back to draft if review surfaces gaps. No gate.
